summary: Iteration 165 - Bug Fixes Verification Complete. All 4 user-reported bugs verified fixed: (1) Admin payment bypass working correctly - admin accounts have all features unlocked by design (ADMIN_EMAILS env var). (2) Grounds tab font reduced from text-lg to text-sm/text-base. (3) Grounds PDF/Print view footer shows 'Grounds of Merit Report — {appellant name}' + date + page numbers. (4) Translation error handling improved with timeout and server error messages.
critical_code_review_comments: ADMIN PAYMENT BYPASS: Verified working - GET /api/cases/{case_id}/payments returns all features unlocked (grounds_of_merit, full_report, extensive_report) for admin user djkingy79@gmail.com
GROUNDS FONT SIZE: Verified - Ground title h4 element has classes 'text-sm sm:text-base' (reduced from text-lg)
GROUNDS PDF VIEW: Verified - PDF View button opens document-preview page with proper footer containing 'Grounds of Merit Report — {appellant name}' + date + page number CSS
GROUNDS PRINT VIEW: Verified - Print View button present alongside PDF View and Word View buttons
SINGLE GROUND FOOTER: Code verified - buildSingleGroundHtml includes footer with 'Ground of Merit Report — {appellant name} — {date}' + page number
TRANSLATION API: GET /api/languages returns 41 languages. Translation endpoint handles timeouts (502) and server errors (500) gracefully
CASE EXPORT PACK: GET /api/cases/{case_id}/export/case-pack returns valid PDF with footer on every page
BARRISTER VIEW: Translate button visible in report header toolbar alongside Print, Export Word, Export PDF, Acceptance Pack, Quick Brief buttons
LAZY LOADING: React.lazy pages (report view, barrister view) render correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used existing case_f8bf63e9dcbe (Homann v R) with 12 grounds and 6 reports
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 165 verified all 4 bug fixes: (1) Admin payment bypass is BY DESIGN via ADMIN_EMAILS env var - admin accounts automatically have all features unlocked. (2) Ground title font reduced to text-sm sm:text-base. (3) Grounds export footer now shows 'Grounds of Merit Report — {appellant name}' + date + page number on every printed page using CSS @page and position:fixed. (4) Translation error handling improved with specific messages for timeouts and server errors. All backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified working correctly.
